meta.title: FlatHunter AI — smart housing search
meta.description: Telegram Mini App for smart apartment search in Ukraine

hero.title: Great apartments — before everyone else.
hero.description: One workspace instead of dozens of tabs. FlatHunter AI checks sources, removes duplicates and shows only relevant options.

status.title: System status
status.previewDescription: Open the app in Telegram to use secure authentication. The browser provides a safe UI preview without a development login bypass.
status.authError: Telegram session validation failed. Close and reopen the Mini App.
status.apiError: The backend is currently unavailable. The interface remains in demo mode.

daily.title: Daily AI summary
daily.text: During the last 24 hours, 42 listings were found. Seven match the core criteria and two scored above 85%.
daily.note: The AI module will be connected in stage 8
